name: Administration Policy Schema
description: Defines the structural contract for policy files stored in the Administration Vault. All policy markdown files must have corresponding metadata entries conforming to this schema.

id.description: Unique kebab-case identifier for the policy.

area.description: Policy area taxonomy key. Must match a value from policy-areas.json.

owner.description: Agent ID or human role responsible for this policy.

reviewCadence.description: How often this policy must be reviewed.

lastReviewedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last review.

applicableTo.description: List of department or role identifiers that this policy applies to. Use '*' for organization-wide.

contentHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the policy markdown content for change detection.

vaultPath.description: Relative vault path to the policy markdown file.

maxTokens.description: Maximum token count for context-window safety. Must be <= 16000.
